goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand the codebase organization
Find relevant source files related to document management functionality
Search for specific code patterns related to document processing or file handling

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and detail-oriented. Prefers understanding the codebase structure before diving into specific implementations.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, found relevant source files, and located specific code patterns related to document management functionality.
